tables.description: Subject ID, education, ethnicity, smoking status, Alzheimer disease symptoms, Parkinsonism, Parkinson disease symptoms, Parkinson disease symptoms, bradykinesia, cerebellar signs, Parkinson disease diagnosis, encephalitis, FAM, handedness, history of head injury, hypotension, levodopa induced chorea, MRI, oculogyric crisis, onset greater than 20 years of age, persistent asymmetry, persistent asymmetry, progressive disorder, race, sustained remission, rest tremor, sensory deficits, supranuclear Gaze Palsy, unexplained upper motor neuron signs, affection status, and year of birth of participants with or without Parkinson's disease and involved in the "Genetic Analysis of Parkinson's Disease" project.
